creator: rpsfa@rit.edu
text:
Nick,

I am unable to reproduce this.  Can you please provide specific instructions (including which build options you are using) as well as any additional information you can find?

If you have a /etc/make.conf, can you temporarily rename it and retry the build?

Please submit logs as attachments to the PR instead of a third-party file exchanger.

Thanks,
-r
